operational_knowledge_units.title: Ignition provides API functionality for Aveva integration
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that Ignition has APIs intended to provide functionality to Aveva.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'APIs / section to give the functionality to Aveva.'
Bullet: 'Ignition has the APIs outlined in the API section to give the functionality to Aveva.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Ignition exposes APIs described in the API section, and those APIs provide functionality to Aveva.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Aveva requests trigger Ignition API calls and tag recreation
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes a behavior where Aveva sends a request, Ignition makes an API request, and the data is recreated in tags.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'Aveva will send a request which Ignition will make an API request and recreate the data in tags.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Operational behavior on this slide: Aveva sends a request, Ignition performs an API request, and the returned or processed data is recreated in tags.

discarded_candidates.reason: The slide describes API capability and high-level request flow between Aveva and Ignition, but does not provide explicit reusable action steps, API names, parameters, or an operator/support procedure.
